name: Chatham Park YMCA
description: Chatham Park YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pittsboro, NC. There are 5 wood and hard courts. 3 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, water, and lights.
fees: Members only — Can pay a one-time fee to play if you do not have a membership

name: Fitness  World
description: Come play pickleball at Fitness World in Pittsboro, NC! You'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Haw River Christian Academy
description: Haw River Christian Academy is a place to play pickleball in Pittsboro, NC. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are private.

name: McClenahan Street Park
description: McClenahan Street Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Pittsboro, NC. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Paddles Swim & Pickleball
description: 8 outside courts 4 under the lights - members only
